n_top_genes.guidance: Number of highly variable genes to select. 2000-3000 is standard. Use higher (4000-5000) for heterogeneous tissues with many cell types.

flavor.guidance: Method for HVG selection. 'seurat' works on log-normalized data. 'seurat_v3' works on raw counts (before log-norm) and uses variance-stabilizing transformation — often preferred.

min_mean.guidance: Minimum mean expression cutoff (for 'seurat' and 'cell_ranger' flavors).

batch_key.guidance: If set, select HVGs per batch and take the union. Use when integrating multi-batch data to avoid batch-driven gene selection.

validation.check: Number of HVGs should be between 500 and 8000. If too few, lower min_disp or increase n_top_genes.
